prompt: A high-quality digital illustration of a handsome young man with {argument name=\"hair style\" default=\"wavy, shoulder-length brunette hair\"} and light facial stubble. The style is a blend of intricate ink line art and ethereal watercolor washes. He is wearing a detailed {argument name=\"outfit\" default=\"dark green paisley patterned button-down shirt\"}. The background features soft, abstract splashes of {argument name=\"background colors\" default=\"cerulean blue and warm ochre\"} on a textured cream paper canvas. Soft, natural lighting with a gentle, confident expression.
